channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Iran Signals Defiance by Naming Khamenei’s Son as Supreme Leader
item.description: What Mojtaba Khamenei’s appointment means for Iran’s future.

item.title: What Jimmy Lai’s 20-Year Sentence Means for Hong Kong’s International Status
item.description: The erosion of press freedom is altering perceptions of the city as a global hub.
